title: Ancient Return
description: The Pigman is back, better than ever.
body:
![Title](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/2V1y1EE5/images/d33570c5a5f400d323c0c19b32118206565bd3ae.png)


## 🐷 Information

---

This mod adds the once removed **Pigmen** (not the zombie version, the one you could've traded with!) back into ***Minecraft***.

![Feeding a Golden Apple to a Pig](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/2V1y1EE5/images/6ab8e679c9069ab6d48c4ba3afe0286d88bff950.gif)

****Here's how they work****, if you feed a pig a Golden Apple, they will turn into a Pigman. You right click them with a **Brewing Stand, Loom or Smithing Table** to give them the following professions, **Chemist, Shepherd or Blacksmith**!

⚔️ Not your cup of tea?

If you give them a sword, they will attack monsters for you! You can even hand them some iron armor for some added protection. **(iron armor only)**

![Gearing a Pigman up!](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/2V1y1EE5/images/4e2375c54d0aa928c5fdd3865bc123d64f00319a.gif)

## 🚪 Details

---

Each profession will use different types of currency, for example, the Chemist likes Gold while the Shepherd likes Iron.
**If you want a look on what the trades are on these professions, click the spoiler!**
